mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in PAYEMS signals improving household income and business demand for labor, raising expected corporate revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month PAYEMS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward instances or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 9.0%, labor-market slack signals weak aggregate demand and pressure on margins, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.5% while CPIAUCSL inflation is not accelerating, policy easing lowers discount rates without an inflation penalty, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.5% and 3-month CPIAUCSL growth is below its prior 3-month growth
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional average in a majority of triggered cases or if interaction coefficients are not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in RSAFS signals strengthening consumer demand, raising near-term revenue expectations for listed firms and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS changes do not deliver higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative changes over rolling 3-year windows or if Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO crosses below 95 and remains below its 3-month average, manufacturing weakness signals falling operating leverage and earnings risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below 95 and is below its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below non-triggered returns at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses below 700, weak residential construction signals reduced durable-goods demand and credit-sensitive activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-700 triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if triggered mean return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 is rising while UNRATE remains above 8%, the economy is in early recovery with large slack, allowing earnings rebound without wage pressure and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 1-quarter change is positive and UNRATE is above 8.0%
regime_hint: early-cycle recovery with elevated labor slack
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform the unconditional 60-day S&P 500 return in at least 60% of walk-forward windows or if the interaction term is nonpositive.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL growth accelerates while FEDFUNDS stays below 1.0%, inflation pressure without rate normalization raises real-income and margin risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month CPIAUCSL growth crosses above its prior 3-month growth while FEDFUNDS is below 1.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-acceleration and low-rate trigger is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered return is not below baseline.
